property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
01:44:45.588 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.lucy.lms.LucyContentLmsApplicationTests]: LucyContentLmsApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 01:44:45.672 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.lucy.lms.LucyContentLmsApplication for test class com.lucy.lms.LucyContentLmsApplicationTests 01:44:45.753 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.lucy.lms.LucyContentLmsApplicationTests]: LucyContentLmsApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 01:44:45.755 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.lucy.lms.LucyContentLmsApplication for test class com.lucy.lms.LucyContentLmsApplicationTests 01:44:45.820 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

2026-05-27T01:44:46.117+07:00 INFO 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] c.l.lms.LucyContentLmsApplicationTests : Starting LucyContentLmsApplicationTests using Java 17.0.12 with PID 20836 (started by ACER in D:\LucyProject\lucy-content-lms) 2026-05-27T01:44:46.119+07:00 INFO 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] c.l.lms.LucyContentLmsApplicationTests : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-05-27T01:44:46.119+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] o.s.boot.SpringApplication : Loading source class com.lucy.lms.LucyContentLmsApplication 2026-05-27T01:44:46.154+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] o.s.b.d.settings.DevToolsSettings : Included patterns for restart : [] 2026-05-27T01:44:46.154+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] o.s.b.d.settings.DevToolsSettings : Excluded patterns for restart : [/spring-boot-starter-[\w-]+/, /spring-boot/(bin|build|out)/, /spring-boot-starter/(bin|build|out)/, /spring-boot-devtools/(bin|build|out)/, /spring-boot-actuator/(bin|build|out)/, /spring-boot-autoconfigure/(bin|build|out)/] 2026-05-27T01:44:46.154+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] o.s.w.c.s.GenericWebApplicationContext : Refreshing org.springframework.web.context.support.GenericWebApplicationContext@28348c6 2026-05-27T01:44:46.945+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] o.s.b.a.AutoConfigurationPackages : @EnableAutoConfiguration was declared on a class in the package 'com.lucy.lms'. Automatic @Repository and @Entity scanning is enabled. 2026-05-27T01:44:47.043+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : 4 mappings in 'requestMappingHandlerMapping' 2026-05-27T01:44:47.070+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] o.s.w.s.handler.SimpleUrlHandlerMapping : Patterns [/webjars/**, /**] in 'resourceHandlerMapping' 2026-05-27T01:44:47.090+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerAdapter : ControllerAdvice beans: 0 @ModelAttribute, 0 @InitBinder, 2 RequestBodyAdvice, 1 ResponseBodyAdvice 2026-05-27T01:44:47.163+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : ControllerAdvice beans: 0 @ExceptionHandler, 1 ResponseBodyAdvice 2026-05-27T01:44:47.277+07:00 DEBUG 20836 --- [lucy-content-lms] [ main] .s.b.a.l.ConditionEvaluationReportLogger :
